prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is C-301 Block/brick laying within 2.5 Concrete & Masonry. The relevant subcategory is 2.5.3 Masonry. The observed field condition is: head joints unfilled (visible voids). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors TMS 402/602.
title: T2 C-301 Code/spec compliance
